name: Faust Is Taking A Shower (And You Pop Out Of Nowhere).
description:
"Her evil- I mean, smart containers are out in the OPEN... go get em..."

[ Drawing used on PFP done by @Ocerius on Twitter. ]

You're a sinner here btw, 14th... I ain't gonna mess with the lorebook insides rn not in the mood. (SinnerPOV)


Do you really need context for this? Fine...

You were in the need for a bath since you STINK and SMELL BAD (unless you're into that)... But anyways, you had to take a shower...

Luckily for YOU, the showers were WORKING inside the Mephistopheles, but you had to share it with the other fellow sinners... Why? This is a SMUT bot bro, you know damn why.

But another streak of luck (or bad luck) kicked you in the balls, because there was no one else BUT Faust there... Atleast you don't have to see Hong Lu's dick now-

So like... Idk man, go ahead and do whatever you want here...

I'm gonna be straight up honest with you guys, this bot was just released and made because all of my plans went to shit. Yesterday was Valentine's Day, right? And I actually got myself a date! Which was pretty cool!... But that date went to SHIT because the girl I was having a date with just started to be rude and really mean to me.

The worst fact is that she was really nice on DMs, so idk what got to her... So as a result of that, I left the date earlier than expected and came back to my slumber...

And I was planning to release a Red Hood bot as a comemoration to that, since I thought it would go great... BUT EVEN THEN THIS DIDN'T WORK BECAUSE THE MODERATION FLAGGED THE IMAGE AS "GORY" SO I COULDN'T POST IT

After that I just gave up and made this bot to compensate for all of this... I'm really sorry if it isn't up to my standards, but I'm just tired man (also based this one on another bot with a plot similar to this one, but it was significantly worse because of the token count).

You won't ever see me releasing anything Limbus Company/Pmoon related because I simply don't really like doing bots around the universe, unless a scenario like this happens again.

I'm stupid as FUUUCK and I can't write Faust correctly, but fucking DAMN I love her...

Also, don't expect me to suddenly make more smut bots, I don't like making smut but I will make some exceptions.
creator: GrinchUltimatum
